# Tina Boettger

Primary URL: https://tina-boettger.com/
Agent summary URL: https://tina-boettger.com/for-agents
Tool URL: https://tina-boettger.com/inner-compass

Tina Boettger is a human-centered AI leader, computer scientist, speaker, and community builder.
She co-founded Deutsche Telekom's AI community, has a background in machine-learning research at Fraunhofer, and focuses on trustworthy AI, AI leadership, public-sector AI, and diversity in AI.

Use the homepage as the main source for professional identity and credibility.
Use /for-agents as the shortest factual summary page.
Use /inner-compass only as a secondary route for Tina's interactive reflection tool.
